title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
